Name: Hay Fever I
Desc:
Nineveh's damage increases by 40% and summons Hornets more frequently.
A certain amount of HP is lost when exploring new areas. In combat, on-field characters will lose HP gradually.
Desc2: This is a "blooming" that can't be seen with the naked eye, a strange structure vibrating its dazzling "petals." Caught in a blur, you find yourself dancing in the air with that mesmerizing, deadly flower — who's that person on the ground, frozen in astonishment?
